headline: AirAsia orders 150 Airbus A220 aircraft powered by RTX's Pratt & Whitney GTF engines
summary: AirAsia X (AirAsia) has ordered 150 Airbus A220 aircraft powered by Pratt & Whitney GTF™ engines, with the first of these aircraft to be delivered starting in 2028. Pratt & Whitney, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, will provide AirAsia with engine maintenance through a 12-year EngineWise® Comprehensive service agreement.

headline: RTX Corporation (RTX): One of the Best Large Cap Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds
summary: RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX) is among the 10 Best Large Cap Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On April 30, the company announced that its board of directors had approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per share, representing a 7.4% sequential increase. headline: RTX's Raytheon receives major order for SharpSight radars from Blue Raven
summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has been awarded a contract from Blue Raven to produce 120 SharpSight™ radars, marking the largest single order to date for the new system and a key step in expanding its availability to customers worldwide.
